segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, I'm a new PhD student, and I'm trying to find the architecture department.

segments.speaker: Security
segments.text: Do you have a student ID yet?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Not yet. I just arrived, so I'm still getting set up.

segments.speaker: Security
segments.text: No problem. Which building are you looking for?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I believe it's the school of architecture building, but I'm not sure which entrance to use.

segments.speaker: Security
segments.text: Go through this courtyard, then take the second door on your right.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Courtyard, second door on the right?

segments.speaker: Security
segments.text: Exactly. The department office is on the third floor.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. First day, so I'm trying not to look completely lost.
